name: Dark Flare
description:
Conjure a ball of solar energy to heave at an enemy, dealing 2483 Magic Damage and increasing your damage done with class abilities by 5% for 10 seconds.

Afflicts the target and enemies within 8 meters with Major Defile, reducing their healing received and damage shield strength by 12% for 4 seconds.
 
Also grants you Empower for 10 seconds, increasing the damage of your Heavy Attacks against monsters by 70%.
